name: Sweet and Sour Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 Pounds Blade Steak, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large saucepan and brown the meat until evenly colored.
2. Add the onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are softened.
3. Stir in the salt and bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Pour in the boiling water and lemon juice, then stir well.
5. Bring the mixture back to a boil, cover, and simmer for two hours.
6. Stir in the brown sugar and taste. Add more sugar if you prefer a sweeter flavor or more lemon juice for a tangier taste.
7. Continue cooking, covered, for another hour after adding the sugar and lemon juice.
8. Serve hot with fluffy rice. This recipe serves 6-8 people.
